|desc={{p|Dialga}}, along with {{p|Palkia}}, was summoned by Cyrus at the [[Spear Pillar]] and was put under his control with the [[Red Chain]]. Dialga then briefly faced {{p|Giratina}} in battle, but the Renegade Pokémon managed to destroy the Red Chain, freeing Dialga from Cyrus's control.

Dialga's only known move is {{m|Roar of Time}}.}}
